name: African Vegetable Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 can garbanzo beans (known also as chickpeas, ceci, etc.)
Several fresh tomatoes (or a large can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry onion and garlic until barely limp. Add chopped chard stems.
2. Either peel the yams or scrub them well with a vegetable brush, then slice into thick slices. Add garbanzo beans, raisins, tomatoes, salt, and pepper. Cook for a couple of minutes.
3. Make a well in the center of the mixture. Place rice inside the well and pat it down until fully saturated. Cover and cook until rice is done (about 25 minutes).
4. Add Tabasco sauce to taste.
NOTES:
A spicy vegetable stew - I got this recipe from my mom, who received it from a friend.
The flavors of the vegetables are enhanced by adding plenty of Tabasco. Adjust the amount to suit your preference.
